patch.value: Context evaluation runner and CI gate: rank-aware quality metrics plus token-budget regression checks
Implement the offline runner that scores pm context/next output against the graded corpus and blocks regressions.

Runner consumes only public SDK read primitives; reports nDCG/MRR-style ranking quality, required-item recall, continuity-delta coverage, and token-budget adherence; baseline from the current assembler is committed; CI gate has documented thresholds and an intentional-update workflow; output includes per-signal attribution once pm-4k6b exposes explanations.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Duplicate check: searched all statuses for context eval runner/quality gate/rank metrics; existing pm-u8n5 is search-only and pm-atfm was the broad parent, so this runner slice is non-duplicate.
